generation_note: Written by perpetual_deep_dive run at 19:11 UTC. Prior run at 18:07 UTC claimed this file was generated but it did not exist — FALSE_REPORT_GAP corrected this run.

anomalies.finding: Bot offline since 2026-04-23 22:17 UTC — 0 trades in 12.9 days. All 60 A/B rules frozen. 8 runtime rules unevaluated.
anomalies.recommendation: Restart bot immediately: cd bot && python run.py paper. Apply soft-start protocol.

anomalies.finding: Prior run at 18:07 UTC wrote master_engine_state.json with report_generated=true and report_path pointing to this file, but the file did not exist. State file claimed completion of an unexecuted write operation.
anomalies.recommendation: Audit all prior master_engine_state.json 'report_generated' claims. This run corrects the gap by actually writing the file.
anomalies.root_cause: Prior run wrote synthesis data into master_engine_state.json daily_synthesis section but failed to open/write the standalone synthesis JSON file. State tracking and actual writes were desynchronized.

anomalies.finding: 4 consecutive losses at time of going offline — circuit breaker threshold is 5. System at risk of triggering breaker on first trade.
anomalies.recommendation: Soft-start protocol: first 5 trades at 50% size, max 3x leverage, until 2 wins achieved.

anomalies.finding: All 8 runtime rules in data/llm/graduated_rules.json have times_correct=0. Cannot distinguish 'no closed trades yet' from 'callback not wired'. If times_correct stays 0 after bot restarts and closes trades, rules engine has no accuracy signal and cannot self-calibrate.
anomalies.recommendation: After restart: monitor graduated_rules.json after first closed trade. Expect times_correct to increment. If not, the outcome callback is missing.

anomalies.finding: 60 A/B rules in feedback/graduated_rules.json frozen with no treatment_wr data. All evaluations stalled since bot went offline.
anomalies.recommendation: On restart, evaluate_active_fixes() at FeedbackLoop.auto_fix should begin measuring treatment vs control WR. Verify at trade #20.

anomalies.finding: All regime-based A/B rules are unmeasurable because llm_regime is never written to trades.csv. 12 regime-based AB rules have treatment_wr=null and cannot graduate.
anomalies.recommendation: PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW: Wire llm_regime from agent Regime output into trade_log write path.

tomorrows_focus.restart_protocol: Soft-start: max 3x leverage, 50% position size for first 5 trades until 2 consecutive wins
